concepts.title: Joins (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER)
concepts.hook: Combine tables; understand join types and cardinality.

concepts.title: Window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, LAG, LEAD)
concepts.hook: Compute running totals, ranks, and neighbor operations without aggregation.

concepts.title: Recursive CTEs
concepts.hook: Traverse hierarchical structures (e.g., org charts, trees).

concepts.title: CASE statements for conditional logic
concepts.hook: Branch within queries; enables metric definitions.

concepts.title: Partitioning and ordered analytics
concepts.hook: Compute aggregates within partitions; essential for funnel and cohort analysis.

concepts.title: Index strategies
concepts.hook: Speed up WHERE and JOIN conditions; tradeoff: write speed.

concepts.title: Query execution plans
concepts.hook: Understand how database executes queries; identify bottlenecks.

concepts.title: Avoiding common pitfalls (N+1 queries, missing JOINs)
concepts.hook: Write efficient queries that don't explode data or compute.
